extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked the final climb in wet conditions, winning by 1:04 over CAMPENAERTS who lost 20-30 seconds to a mechanical bike change.
tactical_patterns: CAMPENAERTS unplanned bike change cost him stage victory, suggests equipment failure risk in wet TT conditions worth 20-30 seconds.
ROGLIČ paced middle section conservatively in rain, gained decisive margin on final climb showing superior wet-weather power distribution.
YATES collapsed in middle sector, losing 20+ seconds to NIBALI there before climb, revealing vulnerability in sustained flat power.
NIBALI gained significantly on middle flat section versus GC rivals, suggesting his diesel power suits longer TT efforts better than explosive climbers.
CONTI maintained Maglia Rosa despite expectations of shake-up, indicating GC men underperformed relative to time gaps held by breakaway rider.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Won stage with perfectly measured effort, took back significant time despite starting in worse rain conditions than early starters.
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: positive: Set fastest early time by 2:26, would have won without mechanical, shows European champion form translating to Grand Tours.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Disaster performance, collapsed in middle flat section losing 20+ seconds to NIBALI, finished outside top 10 on stage.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: Fastest of initial GC group at first check, gained 20+ seconds on YATES in middle sector, suggests strong TT form building.
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: Only 11 seconds behind ROGLIČ at first time check, limiting losses better than other GC threats.
rider_signals.CONTI Valerio: neutral: Retained pink jersey despite being vulnerable, GC favorites underperformed expectations allowing him to keep lead.
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: negative: Specifically mentioned as putting in terrible performance, slower than struggling YATES.
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: neutral: Mentioned as reference point, finishing faster than imploded GC contenders like YATES.
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: neutral: Beat YATES on stage, used as benchmark for disappointing GC rider performances.
